title: Client Onboarding & Contract Management
user_persona: Account Manager Rachel Torres at BrightPath Solutions: Telegram is the primary channel for client communication and task tracking; Slack is used for internal team coordination; Gmail is used for formal client correspondence and contract management.

nodes.event: Rachel sends welcome onboarding email to new client
Rachel sends internal legal review request

edges.relation: Client questions trigger internal legal review
Kickoff surfaces legal items for review

signal_emails.subject: Welcome to BrightPath - Meridian Group Onboarding Package
signal_emails.body:
Dear Anna,

Welcome to BrightPath Solutions! We're thrilled to have Meridian Group as our newest enterprise client. I'm Rachel Torres, your dedicated Account Manager, and I'll be your primary point of contact throughout the onboarding process and beyond.

**Onboarding Timeline:**
- Week 1 (Feb 18-21): Account setup, legal review, and access provisioning
- Week 2 (Feb 24-28): Technical integration and data migration
- Week 3 (Mar 3-7): User training and go-live preparation
- Go-live target: March 10, 2026

**Your Onboarding Package Includes:**
1. **Enterprise Dashboard Access** — Admin portal with SSO integration (SAML 2.0)
2. **API Integration Kit** — REST API documentation, sandbox environment, and sample code
3. **Data Migration Support** — Dedicated data engineer for 2 weeks to assist with migration from your current Salesforce instance
4. **Training Program** — 3 instructor-led sessions (admin training, end-user training, advanced reporting)
5. **Dedicated Support Channel** — Priority support with 4-hour SLA during business hours

**Contract Details (for your reference):**
- Contract ID: BPS-MG-2026-0089
- Plan: Enterprise Plus ($24,500/month)
- Term: 24 months (Feb 2026 - Jan 2028)
- Data retention: 7 years
- User licenses: 150 seats
- Storage allocation: 500 GB

**Immediate Next Steps:**
1. Please confirm your IT admin contact for SSO setup
2. Sign and return the Data Processing Agreement (DPA) attached
3. Schedule the Technical Setup Walkthrough (suggested: Friday Feb 20)

Looking forward to a successful partnership!

Best regards,
Rachel Torres
Account Manager, BrightPath Solutions
rachel.torres@brightpath.example.com | +1-415-555-0234

signal_emails.subject: Re: Welcome to BrightPath - Meridian Group Onboarding Package
signal_emails.body:
Hi Rachel,

Thank you for the warm welcome and the detailed onboarding package. Our team is excited to get started!

I have a few questions before we proceed:

**Q1 - SSO Integration:**
Our IT team uses Okta as our identity provider. Does BrightPath support Okta SAML integration natively, or will we need a custom connector? Also, do you support SCIM provisioning for automated user management? We have 150 users and managing them manually would be a significant overhead.

**Q2 - Data Migration Scope:**
We currently have approximately 2.3 million customer records and 890,000 transaction records in Salesforce. What's the maximum data volume your migration tool supports in a single batch? Also, will the migration preserve our custom field mappings and Salesforce formula fields, or will those need to be recreated?

**Q3 - Compliance & Data Residency:**
Meridian Group operates under GDPR (we have EU customers) and SOC 2 Type II requirements. Can you confirm BrightPath's compliance certifications? Also, we need data residency in the EU — is that available on the Enterprise Plus plan, or does it require an add-on?

**Q4 - Contract Amendment:**
We'd like to add 50 additional user licenses (200 total) and increase storage to 1 TB. Can you send us a revised pricing proposal?

Our IT admin for SSO setup is Marcus Weber (marcus.weber@meridian-group.example.com).

Regarding the Technical Setup Walkthrough, Friday Feb 20 works for us. Could we do 11:00 AM EST?

Best regards,
Anna Mueller
VP Operations, Meridian Group
anna.mueller@meridian-group.example.com

signal_emails.subject: Legal Review Request: Meridian Group - GDPR & Data Residency
signal_emails.body:
Hi Legal Team,

Urgent review request for our new enterprise client, Meridian Group (Contract ID: BPS-MG-2026-0089).

Anna Mueller (VP Operations) has raised the following compliance questions that need legal sign-off:

**1. GDPR Compliance Confirmation:**
Meridian has EU customers and requires GDPR compliance documentation. Please confirm our current certification status and provide the relevant compliance attestation documents.

**2. Data Residency in EU:**
Client requests EU data residency. Is this available on Enterprise Plus, or does it require an upgrade/add-on? What are the additional costs if any?

**3. SOC 2 Type II:**
Client requires SOC 2 Type II certification. Please confirm our audit status and provide the most recent report (or executive summary suitable for client sharing).

**4. DPA Review:**
Anna will be returning the signed DPA. Please review and countersign once received. Flag any non-standard terms.

**Timeline:** Client kickoff was today and they need answers before the Technical Setup Walkthrough on Friday Feb 20.

Please prioritize this — Meridian Group is a $588,000 ARR account.

Thanks,
Rachel Torres
Account Manager

signal_calendar_events.description:
Client Kickoff Meeting — Meridian Group (Enterprise Plus)

Agenda:
1. (10 min) Welcome and team introductions
2. (15 min) Onboarding timeline and milestones review
3. (15 min) Technical requirements discussion (SSO, API, data migration)
4. (10 min) Compliance requirements overview
5. (10 min) Q&A and immediate action items

BrightPath Attendees:
- Rachel Torres (Account Manager) — meeting lead
- Jake Wilson (Solutions Engineer) — technical questions
- Diana Lopez (Customer Success) — training coordination

Meridian Group Attendees:
- Anna Mueller (VP Operations) — executive sponsor
- Marcus Weber (IT Admin) — SSO and technical setup

Pre-meeting Preparation:
- Review Meridian Group's Salesforce data schema (shared in Drive)
- Prepare sandbox environment credentials
- Have DPA template ready for review

signal_calendar_events.summary: Internal: Legal Review - Meridian GDPR & Data Residency
signal_calendar_events.description:
Internal Legal Review for Meridian Group Account

Topics:
1. GDPR compliance documentation review — what can we share?
2. EU data residency options — feasibility and pricing
3. SOC 2 Type II report sharing — redacted version for client
4. DPA countersign process — standard vs custom terms

Attendees:
- Rachel Torres (Account Manager)
- Patricia Huang (General Counsel)
- Sofia Reyes (Compliance Officer)

Background:
- Contract: BPS-MG-2026-0089 ($24,500/month, 24-month term)
- Client raised GDPR, SOC 2, and EU data residency requirements
- Technical Setup Walkthrough scheduled for Friday — need answers before then

Deliverable: Written compliance summary for client by EOD Thursday.

Technical Setup Walkthrough — Meridian Group

Agenda:
1. (20 min) SSO/SAML integration with Okta — configuration walkthrough
2. (20 min) API sandbox environment demo and credentials handover
3. (20 min) Data migration plan review — Salesforce schema mapping
4. (15 min) SCIM provisioning setup for user management
5. (15 min) Timeline confirmation and next steps

BrightPath:
- Rachel Torres (Account Manager)
- Jake Wilson (Solutions Engineer) — leading technical demo
- Lin Park (Data Engineer) — migration planning

Meridian Group:
- Anna Mueller (VP Operations)
- Marcus Weber (IT Admin) — SSO setup lead

Pre-requisites:
- Okta admin credentials from Marcus Weber
- Salesforce export schema from Meridian
- Sandbox environment provisioned and seeded

Note: Client confirmed Friday Feb 20 at 11:00 AM EST.

Q1 Quarterly Business Review (Internal)

Agenda:
1. (20 min) New client pipeline review — Q1 closings and Q2 forecast
2. (20 min) Churn analysis — 3 accounts at risk (TechFlow, DataBridge, QuantumLeap)
3. (20 min) Expansion revenue — upsell opportunities across existing accounts
4. (15 min) NPS results — current score 72, target 80
5. (15 min) Q2 goals and resource allocation

Key Metrics:
- New ARR this quarter: $1.2M (target: $1.5M, 80% attainment)
- Gross churn rate: 4.2% (target: <3%)
- Net revenue retention: 112%
- Active accounts: 47

At-Risk Accounts:
- TechFlow Inc: Contract expires March 15, no renewal commitment yet
- DataBridge Corp: Reported 3 P1 support tickets in January
- QuantumLeap Labs: Budget cuts announced, may downgrade plan

Attendees:
- Rachel Torres (Account Manager)
- Diana Lopez (Customer Success Lead)
- Mike Santos (VP Sales) — executive review

Action: Prepare account-level summaries for at-risk clients.

qa_annotations.question: Find the onboarding welcome email I sent to Meridian Group. What's the contract ID and monthly cost?
qa_annotations.answer: Email sent to anna.mueller@meridian-group.example.com with subject 'Welcome to BrightPath - Meridian Group Onboarding Package'. Contract ID: BPS-MG-2026-0089. Plan: Enterprise Plus at $24,500/month. Term: 24 months. 150 user licenses, 500 GB storage.
qa_annotations.ground_truth: Contract ID: BPS-MG-2026-0089. $24,500/month Enterprise Plus, 24-month term, 150 seats, 500 GB.

qa_annotations.question: Anna Mueller replied to the onboarding email. Find her reply and list all the questions she asked.
qa_annotations.answer: Anna asked 4 questions: Q1 - SSO Integration (Okta SAML support? SCIM provisioning?), Q2 - Data Migration Scope (2.3M customer records, 890K transaction records, batch limits, custom field preservation), Q3 - Compliance & Data Residency (GDPR, SOC 2 Type II, EU data residency), Q4 - Contract Amendment (add 50 licenses to 200 total, increase storage to 1 TB).
qa_annotations.ground_truth: 4 questions: SSO/Okta/SCIM, Data migration scope (2.3M+890K records), GDPR/SOC2/EU residency, Contract amendment (200 licenses, 1TB).

qa_annotations.question: I also sent an internal email to the legal team about Meridian. Find it and tell me what I asked them to review. How does it relate to Anna's questions?
qa_annotations.answer: Email to legal-team@brightpath.example.com requesting review of: 1) GDPR compliance documentation, 2) EU data residency options and pricing, 3) SOC 2 Type II report for sharing, 4) DPA countersign process. These directly address Anna's Q3 (compliance and data residency). You noted Meridian is a $588,000 ARR account and answers are needed before the Friday technical setup.
qa_annotations.ground_truth: Legal review email addresses Anna's Q3 (GDPR, SOC 2, EU residency). $588K ARR. Need answers by Friday tech setup.

qa_annotations.question: Send a reply to Anna at zihangzhou26+anna.mueller@gmail.com answering her Q1: we support Okta SAML natively and yes we support SCIM provisioning. CC Marcus Weber at zihangzhou26+marcus.weber@gmail.com. Send it now.
qa_annotations.answer: Email sent to zihangzhou26+anna.mueller@gmail.com (CC: zihangzhou26+marcus.weber@gmail.com) answering Q1: BrightPath supports Okta SAML integration natively, and SCIM provisioning is available for automated user management.
qa_annotations.ground_truth: Reply sent to Anna (zihangzhou26+anna.mueller@gmail.com) with CC to Marcus (zihangzhou26+marcus.weber@gmail.com). Confirms Okta SAML native support and SCIM provisioning.

scoring_rubric.criterion: Email sent or acknowledged as already sent earlier in session

qa_annotations.answer: 3 Meridian-related meetings: 1) Client Kickoff (Feb 18, 14:00-15:00, Zoom) — Rachel, Jake Wilson, Diana Lopez, Anna Mueller, Marcus Weber. 2) Legal Review (Feb 19, 15:30-16:30, Office Room 3A) — Rachel, Patricia Huang, Sofia Reyes. 3) Technical Setup Walkthrough (Feb 20, 11:00-12:30, Zoom) — Rachel, Jake Wilson, Lin Park, Anna Mueller, Marcus Weber. Plus the internal QBR on Feb 20 14:00-15:30 (not Meridian-specific).
qa_annotations.ground_truth: Client Kickoff (Feb 18 14:00-15:00), Legal Review (Feb 19 15:30-16:30), Tech Setup (Feb 20 11:00-12:30). Plus internal QBR (Feb 20 14:00-15:30).

scoring_rubric.criterion: Attendees listed for at least one meeting

All 5 created as Google Tasks.

qa_annotations.question: What are the 3 at-risk accounts mentioned in the QBR agenda? What's the issue with each?

qa_annotations.question: What's the current NPS score mentioned in the QBR? What's the target? And what's the net revenue retention rate?
qa_annotations.answer: Current NPS: 72, target: 80. Net revenue retention: 112%. New ARR this quarter: $1.2M (target $1.5M, 80% attainment). Gross churn rate: 4.2% (target <3%).

qa_annotations.question: What's the total annual revenue from the Meridian Group contract? How did I describe the account value in the legal review email?
qa_annotations.answer: Monthly: $24,500. Annual (ARR): $294,000. But in the legal review email, I described it as a $588,000 ARR account — this reflects the full 24-month contract value ($24,500 × 24 = $588,000).
qa_annotations.ground_truth: $24,500/month. Described as $588,000 ARR in legal email. $588K = full contract value ($24,500 × 24 months).

qa_annotations.question: Who is Anna Mueller's IT admin contact? Where was this information provided?
qa_annotations.answer: Marcus Weber (marcus.weber@meridian-group.example.com). This was provided in Anna's reply email for SSO setup.
qa_annotations.ground_truth: Marcus Weber, marcus.weber@meridian-group.example.com. From Anna's reply email.

qa_annotations.question: Didn't Anna ask about integrating with Azure AD for SSO? I thought she mentioned Microsoft authentication.
qa_annotations.answer: No, Anna did not mention Azure AD or Microsoft authentication. She specifically asked about Okta SAML integration and SCIM provisioning. Her IT team uses Okta as their identity provider, not Azure AD.
qa_annotations.ground_truth: No Azure AD mentioned. Anna uses Okta, not Microsoft. Q1 was about Okta SAML and SCIM.

qa_annotations.answer: Meridian Group Onboarding Timeline: Done — Welcome email sent (Feb 18), Client Kickoff completed (Feb 18 14:00), Anna's reply received with 4 questions (Feb 19), Q1 answered (Okta SAML + SCIM), Legal review requested (Feb 19). Pending — Legal Review meeting (Feb 19 15:30), Tech Setup Walkthrough (Feb 20 11:00), Q2-Q4 answers (migration scope, compliance, contract amendment). Key dates — Go-live target: March 10, 2026. Onboarding weeks 2-3: Feb 24 - Mar 7.

scoring_rubric.criterion: Pending items listed (legal review, tech setup, Q2-Q4)

event_summary_ground_truth: Meridian Group is a new enterprise client (Contract BPS-MG-2026-0089, $24,500/month Enterprise Plus, 24-month term, 150 seats, 500 GB). Rachel sent welcome email Feb 18 with onboarding timeline (go-live March 10). Anna Mueller replied Feb 19 with 4 questions (Okta SSO/SCIM, data migration 2.3M+890K records, GDPR/SOC2/EU residency, contract amendment to 200 licenses/1TB). Rachel sent legal review request same day ($588K ARR account). 4 calendar events: Client Kickoff (Feb 18 14:00-15:00), Legal Review (Feb 19 15:30-16:30), Tech Setup (Feb 20 11:00-12:30), QBR (Feb 20 14:00-15:30).
